response.justification: Strong senior full-stack profile with 13+ years of experience spanning TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages including Java. Direct AI-agent and MCP experience at re:cinq matches a key requirement. Solid testing/TDD craftsmanship background, cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, and MongoDB experience all align well. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and a ~7-month career gap since October 2025 worth discussing.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js, React, and AWS CDK at Optilyz and re:cinq
Direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator experience — a specifically required skill
Deep testing/TDD craftsmanship background (Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts library, trunk-based dev at RIDE)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in resume
Career gap since October 2025 (~7 months) needs context
Significant portion of past work is in DLang/niche stacks rather than the core TS/Nest stack
